# The Hardwood Guys

> With over two decades of experience, we are your trusted experts for kitchen and bathroom makeovers, living space transformations, and flooring.

- Phone: 470-828-0086
- Website: https://kitchencabinetpaintingguys.com

## Services
- **Kitchen Remodeling**: Professional kitchen cabinet painting and refinishing. A flawless factory-like finish, updated colors, new hardware — at a fraction of replacement cost. Free in-home quotes in 24 hours.
- **Bathroom Remodeling**: Refresh your bathroom with expertly painted vanities and cabinets. The same durable, beautiful finish as our kitchen work. Perfect for updating outdated oak.
- **Hardwood Flooring**: New hardwood installation, refinishing, and repairs. Hundreds of stains and finishes, dustless sanding available, licensed & insured.

## Service Area
Woodstock, Marietta, Alpharetta, Kennesaw, Atlanta, Canton, Acworth, Ball Ground, Roswell, Milton, Jasper, Johns Creek, Towne Lake, Smyrna, Cartersville

## FAQ
### How much does cabinet painting cost?
Kitchen cabinet painting costs a fraction of replacement — typically a few thousand dollars depending on the number of doors and drawers. We give free in-home quotes within 24 hours.

### How long does cabinet painting take?
A typical kitchen takes a few days from prep to final coat. We use durable, factory-like finishes and keep mess to a minimum.

### Do you refinish bathroom vanities and oak cabinets?
Yes. We refinish bathroom vanities and update dated oak cabinets with modern colors and a smooth, long-lasting finish.

### What areas do you serve?
We serve Woodstock, Marietta, Roswell, Alpharetta, Canton, Kennesaw, Acworth and all of Cherokee, Cobb, and North Fulton counties in North Metro Georgia.

### How do I get a free estimate?
Call 470-828-0086 or fill out the form on this page and we'll get back to you with a free in-home quote within 24 hours.
